name: panel
description: Harness skill for the Companion Panel API v1. Multi-persona analysis: ask, debate, explore, challenge, or review a position via panels of personas.

interface.shortDescription: Multi-persona analysis via the Companion Panel API
interface.longDescription: Harness skill for Companion Panel API v1. Run single-persona answers (ask), two-sided debates (debate), full panel deliberations with main-persona synthesis (explore), pressure-test a held position (challenge), or a review pass. Useful for second opinions, side-by-side takes, and stress-testing arguments.
